Communication.title: Why Meta Is My Top Pick: Priced For A Recession With Massive Upside
Communication.excerpt: Meta Platforms, Inc. is my top market pick, trading at a significant discount despite robust growth and aggressive AI investments. META delivered 33% YoY revenue growth and 41% operating margins, with strong monetization offsetting weak user growth. Current margin contraction ref
